/hivefiver research
Persona lane: enterprise_architect
Task: Run MCP-backed research synthesis for writing docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md using provided project context.
Scope: Read-only research only; do not edit files.
Return format:
1) Key research findings (8-12 bullets)
2) Risks/contradictions (if any)
3) Recommended section-level guidance for the 9 required sections.
Success metric: Findings are concrete, architecture-oriented, and map to all 9 sections.
Acceptance criteria: Includes guidance for guardrails, module composition, sync-assets validation references, and integration with 4-layer+17-hook model.
Constraints: No speculative claims without source grounding; keep concise and actionable.
Evidence: Cite source file paths and/or tool evidence used.
